title: Minor text fixes in contributing.md
body: Fixed the merge bot to auto merge once the tests pass, testing that as well.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *umohnani8* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [umohnani8] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@lsm5 I opened a new PR, and looks like it no longer complaining about not having merge rights
It is working now, should merge now once the lgtm label is set
Asked test platform for help to figure out what is going on. Please don't manually merge this

woohoo it worked! https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/272 was blocking it because it had the approve and lgtm labels so it was in the merge pool but a test was failing so it couldn't be merged.
